content.en:
In the face of Chang Shan Yuan Ancestor's attack, Ye Tian directly cast the Endless Light Shield.

Rumble!!!!

A half-step fivefold primordial ancestor's consummation-level natal primordial control technique hit Ye Tian's endless light shield, and it directly shattered, and it couldn't break Ye Tian's defense at all.

Seeing this scene, Changshan Yuan Zu was stunned.

He had broken through to the half-step Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, his strength had changed qualitatively, and he had still comprehended one hundred and eight extreme extremes and mastered two perfection-level natal primordial control techniques.

He admitted that he was not the most powerful, and among the original ancestors who entered the Primordial Golden Domain, there were definitely half-step fivefold ancestors who were much more powerful than him.

However, he never looked for trouble with other half-step fivefold primordial ancestors, only for fourfold peak primordial ancestors.

As a result, I met Ye Tian, a pervert.

Abrupt.

A touch of golden light killed, and it was Ye Tian's supreme natal primordial control technique - endless golden light!

Poof!

Changshan Yuanzu's body was directly pierced, and any means were useless, and the difference in strength was too great!

The Supreme Primordial Mastery Technique is already extremely powerful, and after turning into the Natal Primordial Mastery Technique, the increase is even more terrifying!

Moreover, Ye Tiangang also performed another natal primordial control technique, the Endless Primordial Body, which could also increase the Endless Golden Light.

As a result, the power of the Endless Golden Light was far beyond what Changshan Ancestor could resist!

If Changshan Ancestor's Will Pagoda had been tempered dozens of times, there was still hope that he could stop it, but he had only refined it nine times, and his strength was not strong.

After the first blow, Tsuneyama Harazu was killed.

Swish!

Ye Tian came to the place where Changshan Yuan Ancestor was killed, took the resources on his body, and then left quickly.

Ye Tian killed Changshan Yuanzu, and his ranking on the list soared directly, reaching the top 100.

Of course, the ranking at this time is meaningless, even those half-step sixfold ancestors will not care, only in the later stage, this ranking is meaningful, and the premise is that it cannot come out in advance.

If it comes out early, the ranking will be quickly surpassed by other ancestors.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian found more and more primordial gold beads, and at this time, the killings were also frequent.

Many Quadruple Ancestors were reluctant to go out, and as a result, they were hunted by those half-step Quadruple Ancestors one by one.

The Toothless Gate.

The Frozen Rain Holy Son showed a helpless and regretful look, and sighed deeply: "Hey, you shouldn't have stayed there, you should have come out in time, I found more than a dozen primordial gold beads and some precious resources, and I should have come out, but now I have been killed, and all of them are gone!"

As for the other newly promoted holy sons, they were also killed one by one, and only a few came out in time, thus bringing out a few primordial gold beads, but it didn't mean anything.

What the Void Tooth Holy Gate really valued was the Holy Son who had broken through to the half-step Fivefold Origin Ancestor after entering the Primordial Golden Domain, so that they could hope to obtain a large number of Primordial Gold Beads.

The Void Tooth Holy Gate had also told these half-step fivefold ancestor holy sons to come out immediately as soon as they had collected enough primordial gold beads and not to linger.

After all, in the entire primeval realm, there were too many terrifying primordial ancestors, even the half-step fivefold primordial ancestor saint son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate could be killed by the other party in an instant.

......

"Eighteen hundred primordial gold beads!"

Ye Tian was quite satisfied with his harvest.

With so many primordial gold beads, he can almost make up a two-percent success rate, plus his original fifty-percent success rate, he now has nearly seventy percent hope of becoming a five-fold ancestor.

However, it is not enough!

He will never dislike things like the original gold beads.

"It's too slow to find the Primordial Gold Bead, and I have to take the initiative to hunt those Primordial Ancestors!"

Ye Tian decided.

Not only did he think so, but those powerful half-step fivefold ancestors also thought so, after all, killing an original ancestor could obtain a lot of resources, who wouldn't want to do that?

Find it slowly on your own, how slow it is!

Soon, Ye Tian sensed the existence of a half-step fivefold ancestor.

Come to the opponent with endless speed, directly cast endless golden light, and instantly kill the opponent.

"This guy has actually collected more than 600 Primordial Gold Beads, which is okay, and now the number of my Primordial Gold Beads has reached more than 2,400!" Ye Tian smiled.

Moreover, he also obtained a large amount of resources from this half-step fivefold ancestor, which was also an additional gain.

In the following time, a half-step five-fold ancestor became Ye Tian's hunting target, and a half-step five-fold ancestor was killed by him.

Of course, more Quadruple Peak Ancestors also died at his hands, and if they didn't go out at this time, they still dared to stay here, either because they were confident in their own strength, or they were unwilling to leave.

But no matter which one it was, it was killed by Ye Tian.

Gradually, the number of primordial gold beads on Ye Tian's body exceeded 10,000.

In other words, Ye Tian could 100% break through to the Fifth Primordial Ancestor, and there would be some extra Primordial Gold Beads.

At the same time, Ye Tian's ranking on the list accidentally entered the top ten.

......

The outside world, Wan Xuanbang.

In the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, the name of the Endless Primordial Ancestor is impressively in the ninth place.

Seeing this ranking, the five ancestors of the Shangling Origin Ancestor were stunned.

The Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor was also shocked.

"Endless Ancestor, he rushed to the ninth place !!"

He knew that Ye Tian had entered the top 100 before, but after all, it was the early stage, so this ranking was nothing.

But now it's almost the late stage, and Ye Tian actually killed the ninth place on the Wanxuan List, this is not luck, but strength.

"I remember that the Endless Origin Ancestor has just broken through to the peak realm of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, which means that it is impossible for him to become a half-step Fivefold Primordial Ancestor now! Killing the ninth place on the Ten Thousand Xuan List with the realm of the Quadruple Peak? Is this luck against the sky, finding countless primordial gold beads, or killing a large number of Quadruple Primordial Ancestors along the way?"

He also knew that Ye Tian was almost invincible when he was the Triple Ancestor, and even the Nine Primordial Ancestors were killed by him.

Therefore, this time, the Void Tooth Holy Gate cultivated him and helped him break through to the peak realm of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, and he didn't expect Ye Tian to get any good results in the Primordial Golden Domain.

But now it seems that the strength of the Endless Ancestor is really terrifying, otherwise if you are just lucky, you won't be able to get here!

"The ninth Endless Origin Ancestor, the one from the Upper Spirit Holy Gate is in the seventy or eighty, if it is stabilized, wouldn't there be two top one hundred Origin Ancestors in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain?"

The Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor said happily.

In this way, he is afraid that he will win the bet, and it is ten times the odds!

Of course, this is only a possibility, and if one of the two dies, then he will still lose.

Soon.

The Void Tooth Holy Gate also knew that Ye Tian had entered the ninth place on the Ten Thousand Xuan List, and many of the Fifth Origin Ancestors were shocked.
